title: Geraniospermum cucculatum
taxonomy: Geraniospermum cucculatum is classified within the family Menispermaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as moonseed. This plant is native to tropical regions of Asia and belongs to the order Ranunculales. Within the family Menispermaceae, Geraniospermum cucculatum is further classified into the genus Geraniospermum. The classification of Geraniospermum cucculatum is based on its unique characteristics and morphological features. Further research may be necessary for a more detailed understanding of its classification within the plant kingdom.
